top_signals.title: Russia pounds Ukraine with hypersonic ‘Oreshnik’ missile
top_signals.summary: Capital rocked by explosions after Ukrainian leader Volodymyr Zelenskyy warned of imminent large-scale attack
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FBI warns of Kali365 phishing-as-a-service after April Microsoft 365 attacks
top_signals.summary: The law enforcement agency published an advisory on Thursday about Kali365 — a Telegram-based service for cybercriminals that allows them to capture legitimate "OAuth" tokens enabling widespread access to Microsoft 365 environments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Attacks on Preah Vihear temple hurt all world heritage
